buildCommand: cd apps/web && npm cache clean --force && npm install --legacy-peer-deps && (npm run build || true) && node scripts/generate-index.js

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://api.devnet.solana.com https://api.mainnet-beta.solana.com wss://api.devnet.solana.com;
